landing.hero_body: Three statistical models — Dixon-Coles, ELO, and Bayesian regression — running in ensemble compare our true probabilities against bookmaker odds. We surface only matches with
landing.how_title: From raw data to value bet in 3 steps.
landing.step1_desc: Historical xG, adjusted ELO, rest days, travel, expected lineup, knockout context. Trained on 14k matches.
landing.step2_desc: Dixon-Coles 15% · ELO 30% · Bayesian 55%. Weights optimised via walk-forward backtesting.
landing.step3_desc: Where our true probability exceeds the implied odds probability, we compute EV and Kelly. Only EV ≥ 5% surfaces.
landing.diff_title: What you won't find on tipster sites.
landing.diff1_desc: Published models, visible calibration. Every prediction shows each model's contribution.
landing.diff2_desc: Monthly ROI, Brier score, drawdowns. We show the bad months alongside the good ones.
landing.diff3_desc: We take nothing from bookmakers. Revenue is subscriptions only. 100% unbiased picks.
landing.diff4_desc: Fractional Kelly, 5% bankroll cap, automatic tilt-pattern alerts.
landing.faq1_a: No. We don't accept deposits or process bets. We're an information and analysis platform. Revenue comes 100% from user subscriptions.
landing.faq2_a: No — and anyone who does is lying. Positive EV materialises over the long run (≥500 bets). Over short windows, variance dominates. We offer a mathematical edge, not a guarantee.
landing.faq3_a: Use fractional Kelly sizing. On a £500 bankroll, typical stakes run £5–£25 per match. Conservative sizing is the only sustainable approach.
landing.faq4_a: Because most lines are efficient — the odds reflect true probability. Positive EV is the exception: on average 4–7 matches a day from 30+ on the slate.
landing.referral_banner: {{sponsor}} is giving you 30 days free + {{discount}}% off permanently.
